title: JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd Excluded from SLB Segment Due to Amalgamation
---

## Summary

BSE Clearing Corporation Ltd (BSECL) has notified Trading Members that JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd (Scrip Code: 506943) will be excluded from the Securities Lending and Borrowing (SLB) segment, effective ex-date 17th July 2026. This follows the company's amalgamation as referenced in earlier Exchange notice numbers 20260713-39 and 20260713-9.

## Key Points

- JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd (SLB Code: JBCHEPHARM, Equity Scrip Code: 506943) will be excluded from the SLB segment.
- The exclusion is a consequence of the company's amalgamation.
- No new contracts will be available for trading in this security in the SLB segment after the effective date.
- Refers to prior Exchange notices 20260713-39 and 20260713-9 for background on the amalgamation.

## Regulatory Changes

No new regulatory changes; this is an operational action implementing the consequences of a previously announced amalgamation on the SLB segment.

## Compliance Requirements

Trading Members dealing in SLB contracts for JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd must ensure no new positions or contracts are entered into for this security after the effective ex-date, and must settle/close out existing obligations as per standard SLB segment procedures.

## Important Dates

- Effective Ex-Date: 17 July 2026 (security excluded from SLB segment from this date)
- Notice Date: 16 July 2026

## Impact Assessment

The impact is limited to Trading Members and participants active in the SLB segment for JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd. No further SLB contracts will be available for trading in this security once excluded, which may require participants to unwind or settle existing lending/borrowing positions ahead of the effective date. No broader market-wide impact is expected.
